name: Tasty Bite Eatables Limited
summary: Tasty Bite Eatables Limited manufactures and sells ready-to-eat food, and formed frozen food and specialty sauces under the Tasty Bite brand name in India and internationally. The company offers rice, Indian entr√É¬©es, Asian noodles, patties, appetizers, ready meals, and gravies and pastes, as well as specialty, emulsion, and tomato based sauces; and ingredients, such as basmati rice, black lentils, brown rice, cardamom, cashew nuts, chickpeas, cloves, coconut milk, coriander, and cumin. The company was incorporated in 1985 and is based in Pune, India. Tasty Bite Eatables Limited is a subsidiary of Preferred Brands Foods (India) Private Limited.
